source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/06_(Retrofit) HnX-R1/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/10_Performance/2. [2,3G series] 성능시험성적서 (A-PTR-23G).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Performance test report for HnX-R1 medical image acquisition device 2/3G series detectors A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents performance verification results and PASS outcomes for detector specifications including sensor type, scintillator, pixel characteristics, MTF, DQE, sensitivity, energy range, A/D conversion, wireless standard, IP range, communication, and trigger modes.
keyPoints: The report identifies H&abyz Co., Ltd. as manufacturer and HnX-R1 as the model name.
The report states that the 2/3G series performance settings were confirmed to have no abnormalities.
All listed test items in the performance summary are marked PASS.
Attached supporting documents include a-Si specification, IGZO specification, CsI specification, WiFi module specification, IPX6 test report, IMX8 datasheet, and KGMP certificate.

evidence.claim: The document is Performance Test Report A-PTR-23G, Rev. 0, issued on 2025.07.18.
evidence.evidenceText: Doc No. A-PTR-23G Rev. No. 0 Issue date 2025.07.18

evidence.claim: The report is for medical image acquisition device HnX-R1 2/3G series detector performance confirmation.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 시험 성적서는 의료영상획득장치 (HnX-R1)의 2/3G series 디텍터 성능 확인을 위한 시험성적서이다.

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The product name is medical image acquisition device / Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name 의료영상획득장치 Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The 2/3G series models listed are A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: (2/3G series) A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW

evidence.claim: The test period was 2025.07.14 to 2025.07.18.
The test location was H&abyz in Yongin, Gyeonggi-do, Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: 시험장소: ㈜에이치앤아비즈 (경기도 용인시 처인구 처인성로41-16 2동 1층일부)

evidence.claim: Sensor type verification criteria were PIN-TFT / Flexible PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO), and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensor Type (센서 타입 확인) PIN-TFT / Flexible PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Scintillator verification criterion was CsI, and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Scintillator 확인 CsI 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: A1717MCW total pixel number criterion was at least 3072 x 3072 pixels and PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: A1717MCW Total Pixel Number 확인 3072 x 3072 pixels 이상 ... PASS

evidence.claim: A1417MCW and F1417MCW total pixel number criterion was at least 2560 x 3072 pixels and PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: A1417MCW, F1417MCW 2560 x 3072 pixels 이상 ... PASS

evidence.claim: Pixel pitch criterion was 140 micrometers ± 10%, and the result was PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: 공통 Pixel pitch 140μm ± 10% ... PASS

evidence.claim: MTF criteria were 0.5 lp/mm 83% or higher, 1.0 lp/mm 63% or higher, 2.0 lp/mm 29% or higher, and 3.0 lp/mm 12% or higher; result PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: MTF 0.5lp/mm(83%이상), 1.0lp/mm(63%이상), 2.0lp/mm(29%이상), 3.0lp/mm(12%이상) ... PASS

evidence.claim: DQE criteria were 0.1 lp/mm 60% or higher, 0.5 lp/mm 53% or higher, 1.0 lp/mm 47% or higher, 2.0 lp/mm 37% or higher, and 3.0 lp/mm 21% or higher; result PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: DQE 0.1lp/mm(60%이상), 0.5lp/mm(53%이상), 1.0lp/mm(47%이상), 2.0lp/mm(37%이상), 3.0lp/mm(21%이상) ... PASS

evidence.claim: Sensitivity criterion was at least 160 LSB/uGy at center, and result PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensitivity Center 기준 160LSB/uGy 이상 ... PASS

evidence.claim: Energy range verification required normal operation at 40 kvp and 150 kvp, and result PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Energy range 40kvp, 150kvp 조사 시 정상동작 ... PASS

evidence.claim: A/D conversion uses 16-bit A/D data and converts to 14-bit by removing the lower 2 bits.
evidence.evidenceText: ROIC 보드의 A/D 변환 해상도는 16bit이며, 하위 2비트를 제거하여 14bit로 변환하여 사용하는 방식임.

evidence.claim: Wireless standard criterion was IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac and result PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Wireless standard IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac Wifi 모듈 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Communication criterion was 1Giga-bit Ethernet and result PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Communication 1Giga-bit Ethernet 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Line trigger mode and auto trigger mode were verified as normally operating with PASS results.
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger mode Line trigger 모드 정상동작 ... PASS Auto trigger 모드 정상동작 ... PASS

evidence.claim: The conclusion states no abnormalities in performance setting values for HnX-R1 2/3G series.
evidence.evidenceText: 해당 시험 결과를 통해 의료영상획득장치 (모델명: HnX-R1, 2/3G series)의 성능 설정값에 이상 없음을 확인하였다.

evidence.claim: The IPX6 test report states A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW have waterproof function and testing was based on IEC60529:1989+A1:1999+A2:2013.
evidence.evidenceText: A1717MCW, A1417MCW and F1417MCW have a waterproof function. This test report is about the waterproof test of X-ray detectors based on IEC60529:1989+A1:1999+A2:2013

evidence.claim: The attached IPX6 report concluded the reviewed test results were suitable for IPX6.
evidence.evidenceText: reviewed the test results, we confirmed that it was suitable for IPX6.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is explicitly identified in the performance test report; authoritySignal is only 'general'.

IP rating evidence is conflicting or unclear: summary lists IP56 under IEC 60529, section 4.14 states IEC 60601-1 report satisfies IP54, and then states final IP grade was confirmed as IP68 based on additional IPX6 testing.
Some source text appears OCR-derived or contains typographical errors such as 'Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector' and 'IMX8 DATASHHET'.
Attachment 3 Wifi module specification is listed but no specification text is included in the provided source text.
